caption: A group of people perform a choreographed martial arts demonstration inside a large, carpeted ballroom featuring a recessed ceiling with a large, ornate crystal chandelier. Most participants wear blue uniforms, while one individual is dressed in white and another in black. In the initial moments, the person in white and those in blue engage in dynamic movements, shifting positions and assuming combat stances across the floor. As the sequence progresses, the participants transition from active sparring movements to a structured formation. By the end of the clip, the practitioners stand in a line, holding long wooden staffs upright. Spectators are visible in the background, seated and watching the performance. The lighting is bright and warm, reflecting off the polished surfaces of the room as the practitioners move in unison.
